creator: yds@Necessitu.de
text:
Created attachment 239780
www/uwsgi refactor to build a “server core” and plugins as loadable modules

> Would you by the chance like to take maintainership of this port?

I took the liberty and changed to MAINTAINER=yds@Necessitu.de

this second version of the patch rolls the cURL plugins into the main port and adds two more ports: www/uwsgi-php and www/uwsgi-rack

www/uwsgi-rack also installs the “fiber” and “rbthreads” plugins for Ruby multithreading support.

tested running SearX from ports as a vassal -- logs look good.

compared to the previous version there's a lot less noise in the logs and the RSS size of all the procs is much smaller.
